name: Public.com
ai_strategy_summary: Public.com launched Generated Assets in November 2025 — a first-of-kind system where AI swarms of evaluation agents build custom stock indexes from natural language prompts — and is building toward fully agentic portfolio execution by 2026.
headline_metric: 2,500+ Generated Assets created in first month; agentic brokerage roadmap for 2026
headline_initiative: Generated Assets (AI-built custom indexes) + agentic portfolio execution

investment_portfolio.headline: Generated Assets: AI swarm builds custom stock indexes from natural language prompts
investment_portfolio.detail: Public.com's AI swarm of evaluation agents screens every publicly traded stock based on a user's natural language prompt and assembles a custom index to invest in — launched November 2025. 2,500+ Generated Assets created in the first month.
evidence: 2,500+ Generated Assets created in first month
AI evaluation agent swarm screens all publicly traded stocks
Natural language prompt to investable index
investment_portfolio.jpm_implication: Public.com is making bespoke index construction — previously a high-fee institutional product — available to retail investors at no extra cost. JPM Direct Indexing strategy must account for this.

new_business_models.headline: Agentic Brokerage initial automated investing features launching in 2026 — recurring actions and auto-investing rules live
new_business_models.detail: Public.com's roadmap includes agentic portfolio management — conditional automated trading rules like 'trim 10% of bank stocks if Fed cuts rates' — moving toward a fully autonomous AI portfolio execution model.
evidence: Axios Nov 2025: Public launches Generated Assets — https://www.axios.com/2025/11/17/ai-stock-market-public
FX News Group: Public agentic brokerage features in 2026 rollout
new_business_models.jpm_implication: Agentic brokerage represents the next frontier of retail competition. If JPM does not offer AI-driven conditional portfolio management, next-gen investors will shift AUM to platforms that do.

sources.name: Axios — Public.com launches Generated Assets AI system (Nov 2025)
